---
title: "Reinforcement Learning"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .navbar::before {
    background: transparent !important;
  }
</style>

<div class="container" style="padding: 0 2rem 4rem 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">

  <div class="subject-hero">
    <h1 class="hero-title" style="color: #fff;">Reinforcement Learning</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Comprehensive mathematical foundations and techniques.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="subject-intro">
    <p>
      Select a topic from the sections below to explore detailed derivations, proofs, and
      applications in modern machine learning.
    </p>
  </div>

  <hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); margin: 4rem 0;">

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Markov Decision Processes</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Notation and Conventions</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on notation and conventions.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/notation-and-conventions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Markov Decision Processes</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Policies</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on policies.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/policies.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Value Functions</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on value functions.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/value-functions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Bellman Theory</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Bellman Equations</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on bellman equations.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/bellman-equations.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Bellman Operators</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on bellman operators.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/bellman-operators.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Contraction Mapping Theorem</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on contraction mapping theorem.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/contraction-mapping-theorem.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Optimal Policies and Value Functions</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on optimal policies and value functions.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/optimal-policies-and-value-functions.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Dynamic Programming</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>State Distribution and Stationarity</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on state distribution and stationarity.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/state-distribution-and-stationarity.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Continuous-Time RL</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on continuous-time rl.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/continuous-time-rl.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Continuous-Time Markov Chains</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on continuous-time markov chains.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/continuous-time-markov-chains.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-title" style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Policy Optimization</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid">

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Policy Gradient Theorem</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on policy gradient theorem.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/policy-gradient-theorem.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Stochastic Approximation</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on stochastic approximation.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/stochastic-approximation.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Function Approximation</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on function approximation.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/function-approximation.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Importance Sampling</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on importance sampling.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/importance-sampling.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Trust Region and Natural Policy Gradient</h3>
      <p>Explore detailed notes on trust region and natural policy gradient.</p>
      <a href="reinforcement-learning/trust-region-and-natural-policy-gradient.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script src="/assets/card-tilt.js"></script>
```
